requests.message: ContractFidelity: cb_step_18 intent 'view_display_scope' is not supported by cookbook/source step text; display-scope intent requires view/display/visibility text evidence
ContractFidelity: cb_step_22 intent 'view_display_scope' is not supported by cookbook/source step text; display-scope intent requires view/display/visibility text evidence

cb_step_1.title: Select CT volume for bone density optimization

cb_step_2.title: Create new segmentation 'Bone_Segmentation' in Segment Editor

cb_step_5.title: Adjust threshold range
cb_step_5.instruction: Set the segmentation range using the slider.

cb_step_12.title: Adjust 3D view angle
cb_step_12.instruction: Rotate and zoom to best view of glenoid cavity surface.

cb_step_14.title: Place center point on glenoid cavity
cb_step_14.instruction: Click on the glenoid cavity surface to place the point.

cb_step_18.title: Adjust 3D transform handles
cb_step_18.instruction: Drag the transform handles to position the prosthesis.

cb_step_21.title: Adjust screw?
cb_step_21.instruction: Select 'Adjust screw' if needed, or 'No, stop' to finish.

cb_step_22.title: Adjust screw path endpoints
cb_step_22.instruction: Drag the endpoints of each planning path to the desired position.

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module
Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment
Click the Threshold button in Segment Editor to open the threshold effect
Apply the threshold segmentation
Click the Islands button to open the islands effect
Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect
Apply the island selection
Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point in the Markups module

generate_syntax_issues.error: invalid syntax. Perhaps you forgot a comma? (<unknown>, line 26)

operation_descriptions: Create a new segmentation named Bone_Segmentation in the Segment Editor module
Add a new segment and rename it to Bone_Segment
Click the Threshold button in Segment Editor to open the threshold effect
Apply the threshold segmentation
Click the Islands button to open the islands effect
Select the 'Keep largest island' option in the Islands effect
Apply the island selection
Perform 3D reconstruction of the selected bone segment
Manually adjust the 3D view to get the best angle for placing the fiducial point on the glenoid cavity surface.
Create an empty MarkupsFiducial node named Prosthesis_center_point in the Markups module
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Manually click on the glenoid cavity surface to select a point for the "Prosthesis_center_point".
Perform initial prosthesis implantation using the selected fiducial point
Manually adjust the 3D transform handles.
Confirm and update the prosthesis position after manual adjustment
Generate the surgical plan for the prosthesis
Manually adjust the endpoints of the planning paths.
Confirm and update the screw position after manual adjustment

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
